calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Continued To Dec-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Wendy Pun, #12891.

Harold B. Auerbach, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Gevity HR, Inc., a corporation.
No appearance by defendants Leverage Software, Inc., a corporation, or Michael A. Walsh.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 10, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 10, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 5, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Gevity HR, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Leverage Software, Inc., a corporation and Michael A. Walsh as follows:

Damages/Principal - $86,101.81.
Prejudgment Interest - 22,163.55.
Attorney's Fees - $2,828.00.
Costs -$433.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $111,523.36.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
